channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Students receive career lessons at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: About 30 local students got more than a chance to watch golf at Torrey Pines on Wednesday — they got valuable career insights that could shape their futures.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Pro Picks: Sticking with the preseason prediction of an Eagles-Chiefs Super Bowl rematch
item.description: Familiar foes are facing off in the conference championship games in the NFL playoffs. Patrick Mahomes and the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs take on Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills for the fourth time in the past five postseasons.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ludvig Aberg cards an opening-round 63 for a 2-shot lead at the Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg shot a 9-under 63 Wednesday in what he calls his favorite place in the world, taking a two-shot lead over Danny Walker and Hayden Springer in the opening round of the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions defensive coordinator Aaron Glenn agrees to terms with Jets to be their head coach
item.description: Aaron Glenn is back where his NFL journey began nearly 31 years ago. He was a game-changing cornerback for the New York Jets then. Now he's tasked with helping turn around the fortunes of the franchise.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jaguars GM Trent Baalke is out, clearing a path for Shad Khan to make another run at Liam Coen
item.description: General manager Trent Baalke is out in Jacksonville after the Jaguars failed to land second interviews with three of their top coaching candidates.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rangers goalie Igor Shesterkin trades blows with Senators star as game descends into chaos
item.description: New York Rangers superstar goalie Igor Shesterkin charged straight into a melee during the third period of the Rangers' 5-0 win over the Ottawa Senators on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school boys soccer rankings, Jan. 22, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 10
item.description: Upset losses lead to big shakeup as Bellarmine, Clayton Valley, Dougherty Valley, Menlo-Atherton, Serra elevate into top five
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Spurs-Pacers games in Paris have a notable absence, with Gregg Popovich recovering at home
item.description: PARIS (AP) — Indiana's Rick Carlisle has coached more games against San Antonio's Gregg Popovich than anyone else. They've had 87 head-to-head matchups, including playoffs. Thursday was supposed to be No. 88.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Phillies general manager Ruben Amaro Jr. will launch a hitting competition
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Sluggball, a 4-on-4 baseball competition co-founded by former Philadelphia Phillies general manager Ruben Amaro Jr., is expected to debut in May and tour minor league stadiums this season. Sluggball focuses entirely on situational hitting, with no fielding or running required.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitals netminder Logan Thompson blames rogue nacho platter for Oilers goal
item.description: A cheesy interruption during the Capitals game in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada, on Tuesday night almost threatened Washington's win streak, which improved to five straight after a win over the Oilers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The trial for Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is delayed a day because of a water main break
item.description: QUINCY, Mass. (AP) — A water main break has delayed a trial scheduled Wednesday for Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on allegations that he shoved his girlfriend's head into a wall and repeatedly choked her after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ESPN broadcaster reveals why he was brought to tears on broadcast after Ohio State won national championship
item.description: Kirk Herbstreit addressed his tears that were seen on the ESPN broadcast after Ohio State won the national title, when he revealed his wife, Ally, was diagnosed with breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: American player Ben Shelton criticizes TV interviewers at tournament
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis player Ben Shelton criticized on Wednesday some of the questions and comments made by post-match TV interviewers at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carlos Beltrán is on the verge of Hall of Fame induction, and next year's ballot is wide open
item.description: It now appears it's a question of when, not if, Carlos Beltrán will be voted into the Hall of Fame. In fact, next year could be his time, with the ballot wide open.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The sweet stench of NHL hockey
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Hockey players sweat buckets, perhaps more than any other athletes in any other sport. They are wearing sweaters, after all. "It's disgusting," said Utah Hockey Club center Liam O'Brien.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card
item.description: Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz blow 25-point lead in overtime loss to Pelicans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) - CJ McCollum scored six of his 45 points in overtime and the New Orleans Pelicans orchestrated the largest comeback in franchise history, overcoming a 25-point deficit to beat Utah Jazz 123-119 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, Fox 5

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game vs. Chiefs
item.description: Josh Allen heard the “MVP! MVP!” chants directed at him from the stands, but Buffalo's quarterback deflected the credit following the Bills' hard-fought victory in the divisional playoff round.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former MLB catcher, AL manager of the year for the White Sox dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager of the Chicago White Sox, died this morning in Westfield, New Jersey, after a career that included a World Series championship and a Manager of the Year award.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Comeback attempt falls short, Rams lose to Eagles in NFL Divisional Round
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for touchdown runs of 78 and 62 yards and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Philadelphia Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Los Angeles Rams 28-22 on Sunday to advance to the NFC championsh
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield to remain in prison for now after judge denies bail ruling
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield, whose 2020 rape conviction was vacated late last year, will remain in California state prison for now after a judge declined to make a bail ruling Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Wisconsin nonprofit receives money to curb human trafficking during NFL draft
item.description: 'Awaken' officials, the local nonprofit receiving this money, said this is a great win for the whole community.
item.dc:creator: Paul Steeno, NewsNation

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4
